description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The documents herein contain operational procedures or monitoring requirements unique to this Instance that deviate from or otherwise supplement the general

processes. For the general operational procedures applicable to all Aave-type instances. See [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.1.2.1.2.3 - Aave Functions](9922dcf0-4562-445b-9a46-712f677cce64) and [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.3.2.3 - Aave AToken Withdrawal Action](2560adbb-4a5c-4c95-86cb-04647bb33836).
summary: Add Solana Pioneer Chain Instance To Keel
description: Adds the Solana Instance Configuration Document to Keel's Pioneer Chain Primitive and specifies its associated parameters.
